title: 宣戦！？いっちょセンター！

text_block_list.text:
"I wanna be on stage when I tell everyone about
my plan to win every race."

To fulfill Smart Falcon's request, I set up a mini
concert with the promise of a huge
announcement. Fans come flooding in from all
around.

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan
text_block_list.text:
The concert was sooo good! I can't wait to hear
this big announcement!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I could afford to miss an
announcement from someone as popular as Smart
Falcon! I'm going to be the first to put out an
article!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thank you for joining me here today, everyone! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And now, as you've heard, I have an
announcement to announ—huh?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ahem! ☆ I have an announcement to make!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Ohhhhh?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, are you curious? Put your hands together if
you are! ☆
Clap, clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, that sounds like everyone! Great! Okay...
here I go!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I hereby declare that I will finish first in each of
the following races!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
...?
Ohhhh?

The crowd seems confused at first. However, as
Smart Falcon reels off the names of the races,
their expressions change.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...And finally, the Tokyo Daishoten! I'll be
standing center stage in each and every one! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan
text_block_list.text: A-amazing! I've got to post about this on Umat—oh?! It's already trending?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
A victory declaration! It looks like we're going to
see a different Smart Falcon this year...

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Hello? I've got a special report to put out, so get
everything ready!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
The headline? How about... "Birth of the
Undisputed Champion of Dirt? Smart Falcon
Promises Victory!"

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...Ooh, my announcement is trending at number
one! It's really got some traction!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Now, I bet everyone's gonna want to see if
I can win or not.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Phew... There's no turning back now. I have to win. ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Flash! Are you going for lunch?

Eishin Flash is Falcon's roommate and a rising star
in her own right, albeit on turf.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: No, I just happened to see you...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh? You're pretty smitten with me, huh? ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Assuming someone likes you just because they
said hello is what they call "jumping to
conclusions."

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, whoa! Don't go cold on me all of a
sudden!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...By the way, that declaration you just made has
become quite the hot topic.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, did you see it? Hehe, I knew you were a
fan! ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I was just curious about what you were
up to, considering you're usually so disorganized.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And it looks like you were able to put together a
proper schedule. Not only for the short term, but
all the way to the end of the year.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
T-that doesn't feel like a compliment, but...
thanks, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That said... If you plan things out too much, I
think you might lose that feeling of Falcon charm.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Never mind. Forget what I said. Please do your
best to follow your admirable schedule.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Did Flash just take back what she said?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
She's usually never afraid to speak her mind...
Wonder what was up.
choice_data_list:
Why don't you ask when you get back to the
dorm?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hm, I suppose I could... Oh!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Almost forgot—so after the concert, someone
gave me their business card and said they want to
interview me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I bet there'll be plenty more where that came
from, so let's get my schedule sorted out now!

Although Eishin Flash's words spark my curiosity, I
soon find myself getting snowed under by a rapid
succession of interview requests.
